title: stash (@stash_pomichter) on X
description:
An open source developer connecting all types of hardware using DimOS. 

Snapchat Spectacles + Robot dog vibe coded in &lt;1 day.

Play with hardware and physical space like connecting lego bricks.

title: Gaku Shimizu / oji_chang (@oji_chang) on X
description:
近所の散歩をエルデンリング化するアプリを試作。

スマートグラスEven G2を着けて駅の近くに来ると、重厚なSEに合わせて眼の前に駅名がドンと表示。

ただの散歩なのに、新エリアを発見した感が生まれる。  

（SEはスマホ側から再生）

title:
Recep Şen on Instagram: "From hand tracking to real drone detection same system same logic real time AI tracking built from scratch
#ai #dronetracking #computervision #yolov8 #robotics"
description:
3,379 likes, 64 comments - recep.sen27 on April 16, 2026: "From hand tracking to real drone detection same system same logic real time AI tracking built from scratch
#ai #dronetracking #computervision #yolov8 #robotics".

6,054 likes, 53 comments - _cklive_ on June 1, 2026: "We added hand tracking to CKLive, wired into Flux.

  Finger positions are tracked continuously, and pinch gestures trigger actions you can map to whatever you want. It all runs in real time on an RTX 5090 — the tracking data is just a live input you can route into any part of the pipeline.

  left to imagine. #realtimegeneration #creativeai #cklive #generativeai #liveart".
